segments.text: My son, if you accept my words and store up my commands within you,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: turning your ear to wisdom and applying your heart to understanding—
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: indeed, if you call out for insight and cry aloud for understanding,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: and if you look for it as for silver and search for it as for hidden treasure,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: then you will understand the fear of the Lord and find the knowledge of God.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For the Lord gives wisdom;
from his mouth come knowledge and understanding.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He holds success in store for the upright, he is a shield to those whose walk is blameless,
for he guards the course of the just and protects the way of his faithful ones.
Then you will understand what is right and just and fair—every good path.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For wisdom will enter your heart, and knowledge will be pleasant to your soul.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Discretion will protect you, and understanding will guard you.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Wisdom will save you from the ways of wicked men, from men whose words are perverse,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: who have left the straight paths to walk in dark ways,
who delight in doing wrong and rejoice in the perverseness of evil,
whose paths are crooked and who are devious in their ways.
Wisdom will save you also from the adulterous woman, from the wayward woman with her seductive words,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: who has left the partner of her youth and ignored the covenant she made before God.
Surely her house leads down to death and her paths to the spirits of the dead.
None who go to her return or attain the paths of life.
Thus you will walk in the ways of the good and keep to the paths of the righteous.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For the upright will live in the land, and the blameless will remain in it;
but the wicked will be cut off from the land, and the unfaithful will be torn from it.
